title: gastrochilus monticola
intro: Gastrochilus monticola, also known as the Himalayan orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gastrochilus monticola include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wound healing and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Gastrochilus monticola include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be made by drying and processing the plant's leaves and roots.
